themes.exampleQuote: The ice cream is extremely high quality and can be delicious by itself.
This place has waffles that are just as good as what you could get in Liège!
Add that delicious waffle to it and you go into a brand new realm of delicious.
A comment along the lines of 'I'm not going to waste any more ice cream on you all,' delivered in a rude tone.
We got to try a ton of extra samples, the waffle along with ice cream was absolutely incredible.
The owner is extremely friendly and nice and helped make the experience that much better.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about the exceptional ice cream quality and authentic Liège waffles, but a recurring pattern of rude staff behavior around sampling has left some loyal customers feeling unwelcome.
notable_quote: Im an ice cream snob and this is some of the best ice cream Ive ever had.
